channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Argentina's World Cup exit sparks emotional reflection and future deliberations
item.description: Argentina's Lionel Scaloni expressed deep disappointment after his team's 1-0 defeat to Spain in the 2026 FIFA World Cup final. The match, held at the New York New Jersey Stadium, saw Spain secure vic...

item.title: Recovery from Gender-Based Violence Requires More Than Justice: Key Strategies for Survivors
item.description: The article highlights that survivors of gender-based violence in Africa face challenges beyond legal or economic issues. They need holistic support including safety, income, belonging, and dignity. R...

item.title: Stephen King Criticizes 'Cape Fear' TV Series for Its Unconventional Plot
item.description: Stephen King has offered his critique of the recent Apple TV+ adaptation of 'Cape Fear,' describing it as 'more fucked up than Peter O’Toole on his birthday.' The series, based on John D. MacDonald's ...

item.title: Research Indicates Some Sweeteners May Impact Gut Bacteria
item.description: A laboratory study conducted by researchers at the University of Cambridge has found that 39 commercially used sweeteners may influence the growth of 25 species of gut bacteria. Published in the journ...

item.title: Severe Storm Causes Tree Damage and Power Outages in Elgin County
item.description: A powerful storm struck Elgin County, causing significant damage to local infrastructure. Trees were uprooted, leading to power outages for residents. Emergency services reported multiple incidents, i...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs Over Wildfire Smoke Amid Meeting with Canadian PM
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has reiterated his threat to impose tariffs on Canada over the issue of wildfire smoke affecting U.S. air quality, following a meeting with Canadian Prime Minister Mark Car...

item.title: CJP Continues Protest Until Dharmendra Pradhan Resigns
item.description: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) leaders, including Abhijeet Dipke, Saurav Das, Ashutosh Ranka, and Gitanjali (wife of activist Sonam Wangchuk), have vowed to continue their protest near Kerala House u...

item.title: one nation tightens discipline amid immigration controversy
item.description: One Nation has imposed stricter rules on its members to prevent media engagement, following internal tensions over leader Pauline Hanson's controversial remarks about Australia's immigration policies....

item.title: Argentina President Announces National Holiday for World Cup 2026 Team's Performance
item.description: Argentina's President Javier Milei has declared a national holiday to celebrate the country's World Cup 2026 campaign, even though the team lost the final to Spain 1-0. The match, held on Sunday, saw ...

item.title: Houthis' Oil Blockade Threatens Global Oil Supplies and U.S. Gas Prices
item.description: The Houthis, a Yemeni political and military organization, have imposed a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia, risking the flow of millions of barrels of oil. This move comes in response to Saudi Arabia...

item.title: Fact Check: Edited Video Misrepresents Karen Davila's 2016 Interview on Trillanes
item.description: The article discusses a fact-check revealing that a circulating video clip edited to show journalist Karen Davila accusing former senator Antonio Trillanes IV of overpriced consultants actually misrep...

item.title: Jaecoo J5 BEV electric vehicle launches in South Africa with advanced features
item.description: Jaecoo South Africa has launched pre-orders for its all-electric J5 BEV ahead of its local debut in August 2026. The vehicle offers three powertrain options, including a 58.9kWh lithium iron phosphate...

item.title: Senator Robin Padilla's Unprofessional Conduct During Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial
item.description: The article criticizes Senator Robin Padilla for his unprofessional behavior during the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte. His attempts to showcase historical knowledge were deemed lack...

item.title: Zanzibar's Blue Economy Gains Momentum with Financial Training for Seaweed Farmers
item.description: Zanzibar's blue economy entrepreneurs are being trained to enhance financial management, value addition, and sustainable practices to unlock marine resource potential. Equity Bank Tanzania, under the ...

item.title: Andy Burnham Appointed as UK's Seventh Prime Minister in a Decade
item.description: Andy Burnham has been officially sworn in as the seventh Prime Minister of the United Kingdom in a decade, marking a significant shift in the country's political landscape. The appointment comes after...

item.title: Spain's Football Philosophy and Victory: Lessons for the Global Game
item.description: The article explores Spain's triumph in the World Cup, emphasizing their possession-based strategy and the mental fortitude that defined their victory. It highlights how their football philosophy, roo...

item.title: Lindsey Graham's Death Sparks Legislative Crisis as GOP Faces Spending Bill Challenges
item.description: The passing of Senator Lindsey Graham has left Senate Republicans in disarray, grappling with the chaotic legacy he left behind as chair of the Senate Budget Committee. According to a Politico report,...

item.title: A Grandfather's Eternal Love and Legacy
item.description: The heartfelt tribute captures the profound bond between grandfathers and their grandchildren, emphasizing how these relationships transcend time and death. The author reflects on the unconditional lo...

item.title: Maternal death in Rajasthan highlights systemic issues in childbirth care
item.description: A woman in Jodhpur, Rajasthan, succumbed to post-delivery complications, marking another tragic incident in a series of maternal deaths in the region. The incident involves Samu, who underwent a norma...

item.title: Supreme Court Directs CBSE to Implement Opt-Out Safeguard for APAAR IDs
item.description: The Supreme Court has directed the Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) to implement an opt-out safeguard for the APAAR (Automated Permanent Academic Account Registry) ID system, following a ju...
